summary.lv: Magebit meklē Shopify projektu vadītāju, kurš vadīs Shopify un Shopify Plus projektu pilno dzīves ciklu globāliem zīmoliem un sadarbosies ar klientiem un izstrādātājiem.
summary.en: Magebit seeks a Shopify Project Manager to lead the full lifecycle of Shopify and Shopify Plus projects for global brands, acting as the bridge between clients and developers.
